vocab.meaning: phù hợp với khát vọng của tôi
vocab.example: I opted for International Relations because it perfectly aligns with my aspirations to work for a non-governmental organization.

vocab.meaning: một chủ đề lặp đi lặp lại (niềm đam mê xuyên suốt)
vocab.example: Sustainability has been a recurring theme in my life, so majoring in Environmental Engineering felt like a natural progression.
I chose to study Mathematics because I believe it is the bedrock of all scientific innovation and logic.
Marine Archaeology is a relatively niche field, which is exactly why I found it so intriguing and worth pursuing.
My decision was partly based on my innate aptitude for languages, which made Linguistics an obvious choice.

vocab.meaning: hệ quả/ứng dụng trong thế giới thực
vocab.example: I was fascinated by the real-world implications of Macroeconomics on the lives of ordinary citizens.

vocab.meaning: ngành học đa diện/nhiều khía cạnh
vocab.example: Psychology is such a multifaceted discipline that it offers endless opportunities for research and specialization.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào sự quan tâm đến
vocab.example: A guest lecture I attended in high school sparked a profound interest in Artificial Intelligence.
My dedication to this major is a testament to my long-standing fascination with ancient civilizations.

vocab.meaning: một thế mạnh/tài sản có giá trị trên thị trường lao động
vocab.example: In this digital era, having a degree in Cyber Security is a highly marketable asset that guarantees job stability.
